source_jobs.title: Global Head of Sales
source_jobs.description:
About Mosaic

Mosaic is the AI-driven deal modeling platform for private markets, used by leading investors and advisors including Warburg Pincus, CVC, New Mountain, and Evercore. Mosaic automates and standardizes core deal analyses—such as LBOs and DCFs—so investment teams can move faster, reduce spreadsheet risk, and spend more time on investment judgment.



Mosaic’s platform combines deterministic, rules-based calculations with AI-powered ingestion and agentic workflows to generate replicable, audit-ready outputs that private equity, private credit, and investment banking teams can trust across billion-dollar deals.



Mosaic is on a mission to build the AI-driven operating system for the world’s most sophisticated investors and their advisors. We’re growing quickly and are hiring across engineering, product, customer enablement, and go-to-market teams.



For those excited to sit at the intersection of high finance and technology, Mosaic offers a rare opportunity to shape how the industry operates for decades to come.



Read more about our story:

 - Bloomberg https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2024-09-16/startup-touts-automated-deal-modeling-tool-aimed-at-overworked-junior-bankers?embedded-checkout=true

 - Financial Times https://www.ft.com/content/8c76fefd-dae4-41a9-b963-1a118a29f011

 - NY Post https://nypost.com/2025/01/09/business/this-startup-could-be-the-end-of-wall-street-all-nighters/



About the Role

As Global Head of Sales, you will own Mosaic’s revenue engine end-to-end. You’ll define and execute the global go-to-market strategy, lead and scale a high-performing sales team, and build repeatable systems that drive durable growth across private equity, private credit, and investment banking customer segments.



This is a hands-on leadership role for someone who thrives in early-stage environments: you’ll close strategic deals personally, hire and develop top talent, and partner closely with Product, Engineering, and Customer Enablement to ensure Mosaic becomes the platform of record for deal modeling and investment workflows.



You’ll work directly with senior decision-makers—Partners, MDs, Heads of Investing, and COO/CFO stakeholders—helping them modernize mission-critical processes like Investment Committee modeling, diligence workflows, and standardized deal analytics at scale.



Key Responsibilities

Revenue & GTM Ownership

 - Own global revenue performance across new business and expansion (pipeline, forecast, bookings, ARR).

 - Build and execute Mosaic’s global sales strategy across key segments (PE, credit, IB) and regions.

 - Establish predictable pipeline generation and qualification processes in partnership with Marketing and Sales Development.
   
   

Build a World-Class Sales Team

 - Hire, coach, and lead a team of top-performing sellers (enterprise AEs, SDRs, sales leadership as needed).

 - Create a performance culture with clear expectations, metrics, enablement, and accountability.

 - Implement the sales operating cadence: weekly forecast, pipeline reviews, deal desk rigor, and win/loss analysis.
   
   

Enterprise Deal Leadership

 - Personally lead and/or support complex enterprise sales cycles from first conversation through close.

 - Develop executive-level relationships with global investment and advisory firms.

 - Drive value-based selling tied to measurable outcomes: speed, standardization, risk reduction, governance, and adoption
   
   

Cross-Functional Leadership

 - Partner with Customer Enablement to ensure world-class onboarding, renewals, and expansion motions.

 - Work with Product and Engineering to translate customer insight into roadmap priorities and GTM messaging.

 - Collaborate with leadership on pricing, packaging, deal structure, and territory strategy.
   
   

Build Repeatable Sales Systems

 - Define ICP, segmentation, territories, and account plans for expansion within multi-strategy platforms.

 - Build core sales infrastructure: CRM hygiene, sta

source_jobs.title: Head of EMEA Sales
source_jobs.description:
About Mosaic

Mosaic is the AI-driven deal modeling platform for private markets, used by leading investors and advisors including Warburg Pincus, CVC, New Mountain, and Evercore. Mosaic automates and standardizes core deal analyses—such as LBOs and DCFs—so investment teams can move faster, reduce spreadsheet risk, and spend more time on investment judgment.



Mosaic’s platform combines deterministic, rules-based calculations with AI-powered ingestion and agentic workflows to generate replicable, audit-ready outputs that private equity, private credit, and investment banking teams can trust across billion-dollar deals.



Mosaic is on a mission to build the AI-driven operating system for the world’s most sophisticated investors and their advisors. We’re growing quickly and are hiring across engineering, product, customer enablement, and go-to-market teams.



For those excited to sit at the intersection of high finance and technology, Mosaic offers a rare opportunity to shape how the industry operates for decades to come.



Read more about our story:

 - Bloomberg https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2024-09-16/startup-touts-automated-deal-modeling-tool-aimed-at-overworked-junior-bankers?embedded-checkout=true

 - Financial Times https://www.ft.com/content/8c76fefd-dae4-41a9-b963-1a118a29f011

 - NY Post https://nypost.com/2025/01/09/business/this-startup-could-be-the-end-of-wall-street-all-nighters/



About the Role

As Head of EMEA Sales, you will own Mosaic’s revenue growth across Europe, the Middle East, and Africa—building the region from the ground up. You’ll establish Mosaic as the platform of record for deal modeling and investment workflows at leading private equity firms, private credit platforms, and investment banks.



This is a senior, hands-on role for a builder: you’ll lead strategic enterprise deals, develop repeatable outbound and expansion motions, and help create the playbook for scaling Mosaic internationally. Over time, you’ll hire and manage a team across EMEA as volume and coverage expand.



You’ll work directly with Partners, Managing Directors, and investing teams to modernize the core workflows behind deal execution and IC decisions—replacing fragile Excel processes with replicable, audit-ready modeling powered by deterministic engines and AI-driven automation.



Key Responsibilities

Own EMEA Revenue & Growth

 - Own regional performance across new business and expansion: pipeline, forecast, and bookings.

 - Define and execute Mosaic’s EMEA go-to-market strategy across PE, credit, and advisory segments.

 - Build a predictable enterprise sales motion: account planning, outbound strategy, inbound conversion, and territory coverage.



Close Strategic Enterprise Deals

 - Run complex sales cycles from first meeting through close with senior decision-makers (Partner/MD-level).

 - Lead value-based sales conversations rooted in outcomes: speed, standardization, risk reduction, governance, and adoption.

 - Navigate multi-stakeholder environments including investment teams, ops leaders, and procurement/security.



Build a Repeatable EMEA Playbook

 - Establish ideal customer profiles, segmentation, pricing feedback loops, and regional messaging.

 - Develop consistent sales processes: qualification, deal strategy, POCs/pilots, and close plans.

 - Maintain strong forecasting discipline and CRM hygiene with clear pipeline and stage definitions.



Land-and-Expand Across Platforms

 - Build deep relationships inside each firm to drive multi-team adoption and expansion.

 - Partner with Customer Enablement to ensure excellent onboarding, rollout success, renewals, and upsells.

 - Identify new use cases and workflows where Mosaic can deepen impact.



Be the Voice of the Market Internally

 - Translate customer feedback into actionable insights for Product and Engineering.

 - Bring competitive intelligence and regional buyer nuance into the GTM strategy.

 - Partner with Marketing on events, regi

source_jobs.title: Software Engineer
source_jobs.description:
About Mosaic

Mosaic is the AI-driven deal modeling platform for private markets, used by leading investors and advisors including Warburg Pincus, CVC, New Mountain, and Evercore. Mosaic automates and standardizes core deal analyses—such as LBOs and DCFs—so investment teams can move faster, reduce spreadsheet risk, and spend more time on investment judgment.



Mosaic’s platform combines deterministic, rules-based calculations with AI-powered ingestion and agentic workflows to generate replicable, audit-ready outputs that private equity, private credit, and investment banking teams can trust across billion-dollar deals.



Mosaic is on a mission to build the AI-driven operating system for the world’s most sophisticated investors and their advisors. We’re growing quickly and are hiring across engineering, product, customer enablement, and go-to-market teams.



For those excited to sit at the intersection of high finance and technology, Mosaic offers a rare opportunity to shape how the industry operates for decades to come.



Read more about our story:

 - Bloomberg https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2024-09-16/startup-touts-automated-deal-modeling-tool-aimed-at-overworked-junior-bankers?embedded-checkout=true

 - Financial Times https://www.ft.com/content/8c76fefd-dae4-41a9-b963-1a118a29f011

 - NY Post https://nypost.com/2025/01/09/business/this-startup-could-be-the-end-of-wall-street-all-nighters/



About the Role

As a Fullstack Engineer at Mosaic, you’ll build product experiences that investors and bankers rely on to run high-stakes deal processes. You’ll work across the stack—from sleek, high-trust interfaces to backend services that power modeling, ingestion, collaboration, and workflow automation.

This is a role for builders who want real ownership. You’ll ship features end-to-end, collaborate tightly with product and design, and help establish the technical foundations for a platform used in mission-critical environments. You’ll tackle challenging problems like structured financial computation, document ingestion, auditability, permissions, real-time collaboration, and performance at scale.

Your work will directly impact how the world’s most sophisticated financial teams evaluate acquisitions, credit investments, and major corporate decisions.



Key Responsibilities

Build End-to-End Product Experiences

 - Own features from idea → design → implementation → testing → deployment

 - Build intuitive, polished UI workflows that feel fast and trustworthy

 - Ship backend APIs and services that support complex user actions and data flows

Design Systems that Scale

 - Improve the architecture of core systems powering modeling and analysis

 - Write clean, maintainable, well-tested code that raises the team’s bar

 - Ensure performance and reliability for workflows used in live deal environments

Work in a High-Trust, High-Accuracy Domain

 - Build with auditability and correctness in mind

 - Help define patterns for permissions, versioning, and reproducibility

 - Balance velocity with quality in a product where accuracy matters

Collaborate Deeply with Product & Customers

 - Partner with product, design, and GTM teams to translate needs into product

 - Incorporate feedback from real customer workflows (often built in Excel)

 - Contribute to roadmap shaping through technical insight and execution

Drive Engineering Excellence

 - Participate in code reviews, technical design discussions, and system planning

 - Improve developer tooling, observability, and internal infrastructure

 - Help define best practices as the engineering org scales

Who We’re Looking For

Fullstack Product Builder

 - 2–6+ years of experience building modern web applications

 - Comfortable working across frontend + backend and owning features end-to-end

Strong Frontend Fundamentals

 - Experience building clean UIs with modern frameworks (React preferred)

 - Strong instincts around usability, quality, and UI performance

Backend & S

source_jobs.title: GTM Associate - Banking & Credit
source_jobs.description:
About Mosaic


Mosaic is the AI-driven deal modeling platform for private markets, used by leading investors and advisors including Warburg Pincus, CVC, New Mountain, and Evercore. Mosaic automates and standardizes core deal analyses—such as LBOs and DCFs—so investment teams can move faster, reduce spreadsheet risk, and spend more time on investment judgment.



Mosaic’s platform combines deterministic, rules-based calculations with AI-powered ingestion and agentic workflows to generate replicable, audit-ready outputs that private equity, private credit, and investment banking teams can trust across billion-dollar deals.



Mosaic is on a mission to build the AI-driven operating system for the world’s most sophisticated investors and their advisors. We’re growing quickly and are hiring across engineering, product, customer enablement, and go-to-market teams.



For those excited to sit at the intersection of high finance and technology, Mosaic offers a rare opportunity to shape how the industry operates for decades to come.



Read more about our story:

 - Bloomberg https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2024-09-16/startup-touts-automated-deal-modeling-tool-aimed-at-overworked-junior-bankers?embedded-checkout=true

 - Financial Times https://www.ft.com/content/8c76fefd-dae4-41a9-b963-1a118a29f011

 - NY Post https://nypost.com/2025/01/09/business/this-startup-could-be-the-end-of-wall-street-all-nighters/



About the Role


As part of the Banking & Credit GTM team, you’ll help scale Mosaic’s newest and fastest-growing segments: investment banking and private credit.



This role sits at the center of Mosaic’s growth. You’ll own client relationships end-to-end, building trust with some of the world’s most sophisticated financial minds, guiding firms through adoption, and uncovering opportunities to expand Mosaic across client organizations. You’ll engage directly with senior bankers and investors, using your finance background to map Mosaic into real-world underwriting workflows and legacy Excel models.



Beyond commercial execution, you’ll play a meaningful role in shaping Mosaic’s product roadmap. By working closely with product and engineering, you’ll translate frontline customer insight into new features, developing a highly sought-after product mindset along the way.



This role blends relationship-building, strategic thinking, and deep product fluency. It’s ideal for someone who loves staying close to the deal process but wants to help build the technology redefining how those deals get done.



Key Responsibilities

 - Own Revenue End-to-End: Drive the full sales cycle from outbound prospecting through close with accountability for new business growth.

 - Expand & Retain Accounts: Lead post-sale rollouts to ensure successful deployment, exceptional customer experience, and ownership of expansion and renewal motions.

 - Commercial & Strategic Negotiation: Represent Mosaic in high-stakes commercial and strategic conversations with C-Suite Executives, Partners, Managing Directors, and entire deal teams.

 - Serve as a Trusted Strategic Advisor: Partner directly with senior deal professionals to diagnose workflow pain points and architect Mosaic solutions that materially improve decision-making leverage, execution speed and accuracy, and talent development and retention.

 - Manage a Strategic Portfolio: Build and maintain deep relationships across a portfolio of leading private equity, private credit, and investment banking clients.

 - Influence the Product Roadmap: Collaborate cross-functionally with product and engineering to translate customer feedback into clear, high-impact feature requirements.



Who We’re Looking For

 - Relevant Finance Background: 2–4+ years of experience in private equity, private credit, or investment banking.

 - Modeling & Valuation Fluency: Strong command of financial modeling and valuation concepts, with the ability to speak credibly with deal professionals.

 - Executive-Level Commun

source_jobs.title: Founding Designer
source_jobs.description:
About Mosaic

Mosaic is the AI-driven deal modeling platform for private markets, used by leading investors and advisors including Warburg Pincus, CVC, New Mountain, and Evercore. Mosaic automates and standardizes core deal analyses—such as LBOs and DCFs—so investment teams can move faster, reduce spreadsheet risk, and spend more time on investment judgment.

Mosaic’s platform combines deterministic, rules-based calculations with AI-powered ingestion and agentic workflows to generate replicable, audit-ready outputs that private equity, private credit, and investment banking teams can trust across billion-dollar deals.

Mosaic is on a mission to build the AI-driven operating system for the world’s most sophisticated investors and their advisors. We’re growing quickly and are hiring across engineering, product, customer enablement, and go-to-market teams.

For those excited to sit at the intersection of high finance and technology, Mosaic offers a rare opportunity to shape how the industry operates for decades to come.

Read more about our story:

 - Bloomberg https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2024-09-16/startup-touts-automated-deal-modeling-tool-aimed-at-overworked-junior-bankers?embedded-checkout=true

 - Financial Times https://www.ft.com/content/8c76fefd-dae4-41a9-b963-1a118a29f011

 - NY Post https://nypost.com/2025/01/09/business/this-startup-could-be-the-end-of-wall-street-all-nighters/



About the Role

Mosaic is hiring a Founding Designer to shape the product experience from the ground up.

This is a high-ownership role for someone who wants to define design at a company building software for some of the most sophisticated decision-makers in the world. You’ll work directly with product and engineering leadership to create an intuitive, high-trust platform that transforms how deals get analyzed, reviewed, and executed.

Private market investing runs on spreadsheets, documents, and legacy workflows—and Mosaic is building the next generation of tooling: AI-powered, auditable, and built for speed. As Founding Designer, you’ll turn complex workflows into simple, elegant experiences and establish Mosaic’s design principles, systems, and craft bar.

You’ll be involved across the full lifecycle: customer discovery, workflow design, prototyping, UI systems, interaction design, and shipping product alongside engineers. The scope is broad, the pace is high, and your work will define how Mosaic feels for years to come.



Key Responsibilities


OWN DESIGN END-TO-END

 - Lead design for key product areas from early discovery through launch

 - Translate messy real-world workflows into clear, intuitive product flows

 - Produce high-quality UI and interaction design for core surfaces


BUILD A HIGH-TRUST, HIGH-PERFORMANCE PRODUCT EXPERIENCE

 - Design experiences that feel fast, precise, and dependable

 - Create interfaces that support accuracy, auditability, and confidence

 - Design for power users who live in tools all day (bankers, investors, and deal teams)


DEVELOP MOSAIC’S DESIGN SYSTEM & VISUAL LANGUAGE

 - Establish foundational components, patterns, and UX principles

 - Drive consistency across the product while keeping velocity high

 - Raise the bar on craft, clarity, and usability across everything we ship


PARTNER CROSS-FUNCTIONALLY AND INFLUENCE THE ROADMAP

 - Collaborate closely with product, engineering, and GTM teams

 - Bring customer insight into product decisions and prioritization

 - Use prototypes to explore directions, align stakeholders, and move quickly


BE A BUILDER IN A FAST-GROWING STARTUP

 - Operate with high autonomy and ownership in an unstructured environment

 - Move quickly and iteratively—shipping, learning, refining

 - Help define how design works at Mosaic: process, tools, rituals, and culture



Who We’re Looking For


STRONG PRODUCT DESIGNER WITH FOUNDER-LEVEL OWNERSHIP

 - 4+ years of product design experience (or equivalent craft + portfolio)

 - Excited to be hands-on, scrapp

source_jobs.title: Head of Marketing
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT MOSAIC

Mosaic is the AI-driven deal modeling platform for private markets, used by leading investors and advisors including Warburg Pincus, CVC, New Mountain, and Evercore. Mosaic automates and standardizes core deal analyses—such as LBOs and DCFs—so investment teams can move faster, reduce spreadsheet risk, and spend more time on investment judgment.

Mosaic’s platform combines deterministic, rules-based calculations with AI-powered ingestion and agentic workflows to generate replicable, audit-ready outputs that private equity, private credit, and investment banking teams can trust across billion-dollar deals.

Mosaic is on a mission to build the AI-driven operating system for the world’s most sophisticated investors and their advisors. We’re growing quickly and are hiring across engineering, product, customer enablement, and go-to-market teams.

For those excited to sit at the intersection of high finance and technology, Mosaic offers a rare opportunity to shape how the industry operates for decades to come.



Read more about our story:

 - Bloomberg https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2024-09-16/startup-touts-automated-deal-modeling-tool-aimed-at-overworked-junior-bankers?embedded-checkout=true

 - Financial Times https://www.ft.com/content/8c76fefd-dae4-41a9-b963-1a118a29f011

 - NY Post https://nypost.com/2025/01/09/business/this-startup-could-be-the-end-of-wall-street-all-nighters/



The Role

The Head of Marketing will own Mosaic’s global marketing strategy and execution, with an immediate focus on driving high-quality pipeline in the US market. This is a senior, hands-on leadership role suited to a player-coach who can think strategically while also executing at a high level.

You will report into the Founder/CEO and partner tightly with Sales to drive MQLs, influence revenue outcomes and establish Mosaic as the category leader in AI deal modeling. This role is based full-time in our Midtown Manhattan office.

This role blends enterprise demand generation, brand building, thought leadership and bespoke event marketing in a high-trust financial services context.



Key Responsibilities

Pipeline and Demand Generation

 - Own marketing-sourced pipeline targets across the US market

 - Design and execute a scalable MQL engine aligned to enterprise sales cycles

 - Plan, manage and optimize paid media investment across channels such as LinkedIn, search and retargeting

 - Partner closely with Sales to ensure alignment on ICP definition, lead quality, handoff and conversion
   

Brand, Category and Thought Leadership

 - Position Mosaic as the category-defining AI deal modeling platform for private equity and investment banking

 - Develop and execute a clear brand and messaging framework that resonates with senior finance professionals

 - Build a high-impact thought leadership program across content, social, PR and executive visibility

 - Shape Mosaic’s external narrative in line with a tone and credibility that you will define
   

Events and Community

 - Own Mosaic’s events strategy, including flagship bespoke experiences and selective executive dinners

 - Scale proven formats such as leadership forums and next-generation private equity dinners

 - Ensure events directly support pipeline generation, relationship building and long-term brand equity
   

Product Marketing and Strategy

 - Lead product marketing initiatives including launches, positioning, sales enablement and customer proof points

 - Partner with the CEO and other senior leaders to develop Mosaic’s product strategy, bringing the voice of the customer into roadmap discussions

 - Translate customer insights, market trends and competitive dynamics into actionable product and go-to-market recommendations
   

PR and External Communications

 - Work with PR partners to secure high-quality media coverage in relevant finance, technology and deal-making publications

 - Develop case studies and customer stories with named, credible institutions

source_jobs.title: GTM Associate - Private Equity
source_jobs.description:
About Mosaic

Mosaic is the AI-driven deal modeling platform for private markets, used by leading investors and advisors including Warburg Pincus, CVC, New Mountain, and Evercore. Mosaic automates and standardizes core deal analyses—such as LBOs and DCFs—so investment teams can move faster, reduce spreadsheet risk, and spend more time on investment judgment.



Mosaic’s platform combines deterministic, rules-based calculations with AI-powered ingestion and agentic workflows to generate replicable, audit-ready outputs that private equity, private credit, and investment banking teams can trust across billion-dollar deals.



Mosaic is on a mission to build the AI-driven operating system for the world’s most sophisticated investors and their advisors. We’re growing quickly and are hiring across engineering, product, customer enablement, and go-to-market teams.



For those excited to sit at the intersection of high finance and technology, Mosaic offers a rare opportunity to shape how the industry operates for decades to come.



Read more about our story:

 - Bloomberg https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2024-09-16/startup-touts-automated-deal-modeling-tool-aimed-at-overworked-junior-bankers?embedded-checkout=true

 - Financial Times https://www.ft.com/content/8c76fefd-dae4-41a9-b963-1a118a29f011

 - NY Post https://nypost.com/2025/01/09/business/this-startup-could-be-the-end-of-wall-street-all-nighters/



About the Role
As a Go To Market Associate on the Private Equity team, you’ll be at the frontline of Mosaic’s growth building long-term relationships with current and prospective clients, guiding them through product adoption, and uncovering opportunities to expand our footprint across the firm.



You’ll lead engagements end-to-end: from the first intro call, onboarding, training, and even supporting some of the world’s leading private equity firms through automating their Investment Committee processes. You’ll act as a trusted partner to deal teams, using your private equity skillset to bridge Mosaic’s capabilities into real-world workflows, including mapping our platform to legacy Excel models at some of the world’s largest and most sophisticated firms.



This role blends relationship-building, strategic thinking, and product fluency — ideal for someone who loves staying close to the deal process but wants to be part of a technology-forward team reshaping how the industry works.



“All careers become sales jobs when you get senior enough.” Why wait decades to scale the ladder when you can start making an impact today?



Key Responsibilities

 - Own relationships across a portfolio of leading investment firms, both current clients and prospects evaluating Mosaic.

 - Lead onboarding, training, and workflow design for new teams using the Mosaic platform.

 - Partner with senior investment professionals to understand their strategy and identify where Mosaic can add deeper value.

 - Proactively uncover expansion opportunities by staying close to deal teams and their evolving needs.

 - Support early conversations with new firms and investment teams evaluating Mosaic, from the first intro all the way to a successful rollout.

 - Collaborate cross-functionally with product and engineering to influence Mosaic’s roadmap based on real-world client feedback.

 - Become a subject matter expert on the platform, private equity workflows, and how Mosaic can drive better deal outcomes.
   
   

What We’re Looking For

 - 2-4+ years of experience in private equity, or a related finance field.

 - Strong financial modeling and deal analysis skills, with a deep understanding of private equity investment processes.

 - Strategic mindset and the ability to translate customer feedback into actionable insights for product development.

 - Exceptional communication and relationship-building skills to engage with senior-level investment professionals.

 - A proactive problem-solver with technical curiosity and a passion for innovation.

 -

notes: AI-driven deal modeling platform with a mix of sales, marketing, and tech roles
